name: project-init
description: Cowork project lifecycle for MoxyWolf projects. /init-project scaffolds tailored Project Instructions. /session-start mounts the three standard roots and reads the previous session's handoff. /session-end writes the canonical-named handoff that the next /session-start picks up, refreshes each writable GitHub repo's README.md against a canonical 16-section structure, then runs /obsidian-update to capture durable knowledge into the MoxyWolf vault.
